<p class="key-answer" data-question="Nilotinib 有什麼相關新聞？">
<strong>Nilotinib</strong> 目前有 <strong>11 則</strong>相關新聞報導，預測適應症 20 個。
</p>

<div class="key-takeaway">
本頁整合 Nilotinib 的 AI 預測適應症與最新健康新聞，橘色標示的適應症表示近期有相關新聞報導。
</div>

<div class="drug-info-card">
<strong>藥物資訊</strong>
<ul>
<li><strong>原適應症</strong>：Nilotinib Accord is indicated for the treatment of: - adult and paediatric patients with newly diagnosed Philadelphia chromosome positive chronic myelogenous leukaemia (CML) in the chronic phase, -...</li>
<li><strong>證據等級</strong>：L5</li>
<li><strong>預測適應症</strong>（20 個）：<ul>
<li>dermatofibrosarcoma protuberans（99.3%）</li>
<li>liposarcoma（98.8%）</li>
<li>ovarian myxoid liposarcoma（98.7%）</li>
<li>Ewing sarcoma（98.5%）</li>
<li>ganglioneuroblastoma (disease)（97.0%）</li>
<li>heart fibrosarcoma（97.0%）</li>
<li>vertebral anomalies and variable endocrine and T-cell dysfunction（96.9%）</li>
<li>kidney fibrosarcoma（96.9%）</li>
<li>fibroblastic neoplasm（96.9%）</li>
<li>conventional fibrosarcoma（96.8%）</li>
<li>low grade fibromyxoid sarcoma（96.6%）</li>
<li>uterine corpus sarcoma（96.4%）</li>
<li>retroperitoneal neoplasm（96.2%）</li>
<li>vulva sarcoma（95.6%）</li>
<li>neuroblastoma（95.6%）</li>
<li>myeloid leukemia（95.3%）</li>
<li>chronic myelogenous leukemia, BCR-ABL1 positive（94.9%）</li>
<li>liver fibrosarcoma（94.8%）</li>
<li>fibromatosis, gingival（94.6%）</li>
<li>chronic lymphocytic leukemia/small lymphocytic lymphoma with immunoglobulin heavy chain variable-region gene somatic hypermutation（94.3%）</li>
</ul></li>
</ul>
<p><a href="{{ '/drugs/nilotinib/' | relative_url }}">查看完整藥物報告 →</a></p>
</div>
